note: Single canonical list. Load this file into every prompt that generates outreach. Never duplicate.
forbidden_openers: I hope this message finds you well
I hope this finds you well
Following up on my previous message
I'd love to pick your brain
I think we could really help each other
I hope you don't mind me reaching out
forbidden_patterns_regex: I hope (this|my message|this message) finds you
Would love to (connect and)? (share insights|pick your brain|chat|grab coffee)
required_opener_standard: Lead with a specific observation about their business, a shared Indianapolis context, or a direct and honest value statement. One sentence. No flattery. No vague praise.
examples_bad: I admire the work GreenTech Solutions is doing in sustainability.
Your insights on down payment assistance are vital for our community.
Your work in gospel music is inspiring and pivotal for our community.
I came across your profile and was impressed by your experience.
examples_good: Saw that Isley Plumbing handles backflow testing — we run a certified tester directory for Indiana property managers.
FHLBank's LAUNCH program is one of the most underused DPA resources in Indiana — I help first-time buyers navigate it.
Eastern Star has one of the strongest worship programs in Indianapolis — I wrote a gospel piano theory book and would value your take.
Centric's Indianapolis team works with a lot of mid-market ops teams — I help those same teams cut manual work with AI.
